meta.title: MELE | Multilingual self-discovery tools
meta.description: MELE is a multilingual self-discovery platform for free tests, tarot, runes, Maya calendar, Bazi, Zi Wei, Human Design, astrology, numerology, daily rituals, and member point unlocks.

home.title: MELE
home.subtitle: Self-discovery tool space
home.description: A multilingual tool space for people to understand themselves first: free tests, divination tools, daily rituals, member points, and deeper readings when they are ready.

console.label: Closed beta task board
console.title: Self-discovery journeys are ready
tasks: Start with free tools so visitors can understand their rhythm, energy, and current state.
Members can claim 200 points daily and unlock deeper readings for 100 points when ready.
Guides are optional support for deeper conversations, not the center of the product.

stats.label: 200 daily points
stats.hint: A lightweight daily return loop for beta members.

stats.label: 100 points per unlock
stats.hint: Deep readings, daily, monthly, and yearly transits share one logic.

stats.label: 8 tool entrances
stats.hint: Tarot, runes, Maya, Bazi, Zi Wei, astrology, Human Design, and numerology.

stats.label: One daily choice
stats.hint: Choose tarot or runes once per day for a stronger ritual rhythm.

home.marketsBody: Taiwan, Vietnam, Indonesia, English, and future Japanese and Korean audiences can enter the same tool system in their own language.
home.toolsBody: Each market page reserves sections for free tests, persona analysis, articles, short-form video, social channels, and optional guidance.
home.roleTitle: Clear journeys for members, guides, and operators
home.roleBody: Members start with simple interactive tools; guides only step in when someone wants a deeper conversation.
home.finalTitle: Test, explain, and bring members back before paid launch
home.finalBody: The multilingual foundation keeps current features intact while moving public content into maintainable JSON.

tools.name: Numerology
tools.desc: Read life path, birth-day number, and archetypes from the birth date.

tools.name: Human Design
tools.desc: Understand type, authority, profile, centers, and decision rhythm.

tools.name: Tarot
tools.desc: Use card imagery, position, and orientation to read the present theme.

tools.name: Runes
tools.desc: See obstacles, resources, and a grounded reminder for action.

tools.name: Maya Calendar
tools.desc: Use Kin, tone, and glyphs to understand gifts and timing.

tools.name: Bazi
tools.desc: Read day master, element balance, and seasonal tendencies.

tools.name: Zi Wei Dou Shu
tools.desc: Use palaces and stars to map roles, questions, and direction.

tools.name: Astrology
tools.desc: Read Sun, Moon, rising sign, and planets as a self-knowledge map.

roles.title: Understand yourself before going deeper
roles.body: Members start with simple explanations, then use points to unlock deeper classical-style readings and transit views.

roles.title: Optional support for deeper conversations
roles.body: Guides are optional support for deeper conversations, not the center of the product.

roles.title: Grow through content and market-specific entry points
roles.body: Each market can host articles, short videos, social links, and optional guidance CTAs without changing core code.

items.name: Taiwan Spiritual Gateway
items.body: Traditional Chinese content, LINE flow, self-discovery tools, and daily rituals.

items.name: Vietnam Spiritual Gateway
items.body: Vietnamese tests, short videos, and social growth path.

items.name: Indonesia Spiritual Gateway
items.body: Indonesian content, social routing, and guide collaboration.

items.name: International English Gateway
items.body: English onboarding for tools and consultation flow.

items.name: Japan Gateway
items.body: SEO and market page scaffolding ready for future content.

items.name: Korea Gateway
items.body: SEO and market page scaffolding ready for future content.

page.heroBody: A localized landing page for free tests, persona insights, articles, short videos, official channels, and optional guidance.
page.freeTestsBody: Numerology, Human Design, tarot, Maya, and daily rituals are the first layer of interaction.
page.personaBody: Give members a simple way to understand strengths, friction, and today's action.
page.articlesBody: Reserved for CMS or JSON-managed market content.
page.videoBody: Route TikTok, Reels, Shorts, or local video platforms here.
page.socialBody: Taiwan can prioritize LINE; other markets can use local social accounts.
page.teacherCtaBody: After a beginner reading, members can move toward a suitable guide only if they want deeper support.
